creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text: So the tor daemon fixes the permissions by itself if the user does not allow the more relaxed permissions explicitly (like GroupWritable RelaxDirModeCheck in torrc). Then we might close this PR as that behavior is somewhat OK. I really thought it would refuse to start, at least that was the behavior a while back. Maybe they changed that upstream. Given the "no comments this breaks my tor instance from starting since this patch landed" there is probably no problem related to the initial fix.
